testcase.name: testUnaryMinus_StartOfExpression
testcase.system-out: Engine processing command: - Primary Display: 0 Secondary Display: - Infix Tokens: [-] Last Num: false, Last Op: true, Last Const: false, Last Eq: false Engine processing command: 5 Primary Display: -5 Secondary Display: -5 Infix Tokens: [-5] Last Num: true, Last Op: false, Last Const: false, Last Eq: false Engine processing command: + Primary Display: 0 Secondary Display: -5 + Infix Tokens: [-5, +] Last Num: false, Last Op: true, Last Const: false, Last Eq: false Engine processing command: 3 Primary Display: 3 Secondary Display: -5 + 3 Infix Tokens: [-5, +, 3] Last Num: true, Last Op: false, Last Const: false, Last Eq: false Engine processing command: = InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: Processing token: '-5' (Last Token Type: START) InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: - Identified as NUMERIC InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: Processing token: '+' (Last Token Type: NUMBER) InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: - Identified as OPERATOR InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: Processing token: '3' (Last Token Type: OPERATOR) InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: - Identified as NUMERIC InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: Infix: [-5, +, 3] -> Postfix: [-5, 3, +] PostfixEvaluator Debug: Starting evaluation for tokens: [-5, 3, +] PostfixEvaluator Debug: Processing token: '-5' PostfixEvaluator Debug: -> Pushed Number: -5. Current Stack: [-5] PostfixEvaluator Debug: End of token processing. Stack: [-5] PostfixEvaluator Debug: Processing token: '3' PostfixEvaluator Debug: -> Pushed Number: 3. Current Stack: [-5, 3] PostfixEvaluator Debug: End of token processing. Stack: [-5, 3] PostfixEvaluator Debug: Processing token: '+' PostfixEvaluator Debug: - Identified as OPERATOR: + (Type: BINARY) PostfixEvaluator Debug: - Popped for binary op: -5, 3 PostfixEvaluator Debug: -> Pushed Binary Result: -2. Current Stack: [-2] PostfixEvaluator Debug: End of token processing. Stack: [-2] PostfixEvaluator Debug: Evaluation complete. Final stack size: 1. Final Stack: [-2] Primary Display: -2 Secondary Display: -2 = Infix Tokens: [-2] Last Num: true, Last Op: false, Last Const: false, Last Eq: true

testcase.name: testImplicitMultiplication_NumberAndFunction
testcase.system-out: Engine processing command: 2 Primary Display: 2 Secondary Display: 2 Infix Tokens: [2] Last Num: true, Last Op: false, Last Const: false, Last Eq: false Engine processing command: sin Primary Display: 0 Secondary Display: 2 * sin ( Infix Tokens: [2, *, sin, (] Last Num: false, Last Op: true, Last Const: false, Last Eq: false Engine processing command: 90 Primary Display: 90 Secondary Display: 2 * sin ( 90 Infix Tokens: [2, *, sin, (, 90] Last Num: true, Last Op: false, Last Const: false, Last Eq: false Engine processing command: ) Primary Display: 0 Secondary Display: 2 * sin ( 90 ) Infix Tokens: [2, *, sin, (, 90, )] Last Num: false, Last Op: true, Last Const: false, Last Eq: false Engine processing command: = InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: Processing token: '2' (Last Token Type: START) InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: - Identified as NUMERIC InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: Processing token: '*' (Last Token Type: NUMBER) InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: - Identified as OPERATOR InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: Processing token: 'sin' (Last Token Type: OPERATOR) InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: - Identified as OPERATOR InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: Processing token: '(' (Last Token Type: FUNCTION) InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: - Identified as OPERATOR InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: Processing token: '90' (Last Token Type: PAREN_OPEN) InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: - Identified as NUMERIC InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: Processing token: ')' (Last Token Type: NUMBER) InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: - Identified as OPERATOR InfixToPostfixConverter Debug: Infix: [2, *, sin, (, 90, )] -> Postfix: [2, 90, sin, *] PostfixEvaluator Debug: Starting evaluation for tokens: [2, 90, sin, *] PostfixEvaluator Debug: Processing token: '2' PostfixEvaluator Debug: -> Pushed Number: 2. Current Stack: [2] PostfixEvaluator Debug: End of token processing. Stack: [2] PostfixEvaluator Debug: Processing token: '90' PostfixEvaluator Debug: -> Pushed Number: 90. Current Stack: [2, 90] PostfixEvaluator Debug: End of token processing. Stack: [2, 90] PostfixEvaluator Debug: Processing token: 'sin' PostfixEvaluator Debug: - Identified as OPERATOR: sin (Type: UNARY_FUNCTION) PostfixEvaluator Debug: - Popped for unary op: 90 PostfixEvaluator Debug: -> Pushed Unary Result: 1. Current Stack: [2, 1] PostfixEvaluator Debug: End of token processing. Stack: [2, 1] PostfixEvaluator Debug: Processing token: '*' PostfixEvaluator Debug: - Identified as OPERATOR: * (Type: BINARY) PostfixEvaluator Debug: - Popped for binary op: 2, 1 PostfixEvaluator Debug: -> Pushed Binary Result: 2. Current Stack: [2] PostfixEvaluator Debug: End of token processing. Stack: [2] PostfixEvaluator Debug: Evaluation complete. Final stack size: 1. Final Stack: [2] Primary Display: 2 Secondary Display: 2 = Infix Tokens: [2] Last Num: false, Last Op: true, Last Const: false, Last Eq: true
